---
title: "Figure 3"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}

filename=c(
  "data/figure_3_basic_diagnostics__0418_8")
  


```


```{r}
d<- lapply(paste0(filename, ".csv"), read.csv) %>% 
  bind_rows()
```


```{r}
d<- d %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.))))
```

```{r}
d%>%select(component_path)%>%distinct()%>%pull()

```


```{r}
d<-d%>%mutate(component= component_path %>%
           str_replace("^Probit_statistics_", "") )
   
     
```

```{r}
d%>%select(component)%>%distinct()%>%pull()

```



```{r}
d_mean<-
  d%>%filter(!component%in%c("Probit_statistics","count_r_std","count_dlogL"))%>%
  #select(component_path,component,param_name,algorithm,sample_index,calculus,statistic,param_index,param_col,param_name,simulation_algorithm,noise_in_conductance_tau,Num_ch,interval_in_tau,statistic,probit,quantile_level,value,value_row,value_col)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = c(probit,quantile_level), values_from = value)
d_mean
```

```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
d_mean%>%filter(component=="Report_local_var_y_mean", statistic=="series_mean")%>%select(algorithm)%>%distinct()%>%pull()->algo
for (a in algo){
  print(
    
  
d_mean%>%filter(component=="Report_local_var_y_mean", statistic=="series_mean", algorithm==a)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_point(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=value_row, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ 
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(interval_in_tau~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(a)+scale_x_log10()
)
}
```

```{r}

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Eigenvalue_Spectrum_Fisher_Covariance", statistic=="value")%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_row)))+ 
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle("")+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()

```

```{r}
p=""

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Effective_Rank_Fisher_Covariance", statistic=="value")%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_row)))+ 
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()

```

```{r}

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Eigenvalue_Spectrum_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", statistic=="value")%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_row)))+ 
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()

```

```{r}

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Effective_Rank_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", statistic=="value")%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_row)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_row)))+ 
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()

```


```{r}

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Worst_Subspace_Projector_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", statistic=="value", mean_NA!=0)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(param_name)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(param_name)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(param_name)))+ 
  #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()

```


```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Induced_Bias", algorithm=="macro_IR", param_name!="")%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Induced_Bias",param_name==p)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color="darkgreen")+facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()
  )
  }

```

```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Information_Distortion_Matrix", algorithm=="macro_IR", param_name!="", param_index==param_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Information_Distortion_Matrix",param_name==p)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+scale_y_log10()+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()
  )
  }

```


```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Report_integral_dlogL", algorithm=="macro_IR")%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Report_integral_dlogL",param_name==p)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }

```

Distortion_Corrected_Covariance

```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=6}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algorithm=="macro_IR", param_name!="", param_index==param_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
algo=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", param_name!="", param_index==param_col)%>%select(algorithm)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (a in algo){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component%in%c("Distortion_Corrected_Covariance","Fisher_Covariance"),algorithm==a, param_index==param_col)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(component)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(component)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(component)))+ #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(param_name~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(a)+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }

```

```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Correlation_Of_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algorithm=="macro_IR", param_name!="")%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component%in%c("Correlation_Of_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance","Correlation_Of_Fisher_Covariance"),param_name==p)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(component)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(component)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(component)))+ #geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+
  facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()
  )
  }

```



```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Information_Distortion_Matrix", algorithm=="macro_IR", param_name!="", param_index==param_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Correlation_Distortion_Matrix",param_name==p)%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()
  )
  }

```



```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Moment_statistics_Sum_Gaussian_Fisher_Information", algorithm=="macro_IR", param_name!="", param_index==param_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%distinct()%>%pull()
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Moment_statistics_Sum_Gaussian_Fisher_Information",param_name==p, statistic=="mean")%>%ggplot()+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= (mean_NA),ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+facet_wrap(algorithm~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_x_log10()+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }

```





```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=10}
intervals=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_r_std", algorithm=="macro_IRV" , statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel")%>%select(interval_in_tau)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (interv in intervals){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_r_std",interval_in_tau==interv, algorithm=="macro_IRV" , statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel", value_col<4)%>%
  ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = value_col+1, y = mean_NA, color=value_row))+geom_line(aes(x = value_col+1, y = mean_NA, color=value_row, group = value_row))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=value_col+1, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=value_row))+ 
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color="darkgreen")+scale_x_log10()+facet_wrap(~Num_ch, scales="free")+ggtitle(interv)
  )
  }


```
```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
intervals=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_logL", algorithm=="macro_IRTV" , statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel")%>%select(interval_in_tau)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (interv in intervals){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_logL",interval_in_tau==interv, Num_ch==1000,statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel")%>%
  ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_col)))+geom_line(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_col), group = value_col))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=value_row, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_col)))+ 
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color="darkgreen")+facet_grid(value_col~algorithm, scales="free")+ggtitle(interv)
  )
  }


```


```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
intervals=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_logL", algorithm=="macro_IRTV" , statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel")%>%select(interval_in_tau)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (interv in intervals){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_logL",interval_in_tau==interv, Num_ch==1000,statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel")%>%
  ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_col)))+geom_line(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_col), group = value_col))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=value_row, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_col)))+ 
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color="darkgreen")+facet_grid(value_col~algorithm, scales="free")+ggtitle(interv)
  )
  }


```


```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
intervals=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_r_std", algorithm=="macro_IRTV" , statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel")%>%select(interval_in_tau)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (interv in intervals){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Series_Moment_report_r_std",interval_in_tau==interv, Num_ch==1000,statistic=="series_cross_correlation_kernel", value_col<8)%>%
  ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_col)))+geom_line(aes(x = value_row, y = mean_NA, color=factor(value_col), group = value_col))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x=value_row, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(value_col)))+ 
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color="darkgreen")+facet_grid(value_col~algorithm, scales="free")+ggtitle(interv)
  )
  }


```



```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Information_Distortion_Reconstituted", algorithm=="macro_MR", Num_ch*interval_in_tau>9,is.na(value_row) | is.na(value_col) | value_row==value_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Information_Distortion_Reconstituted",param_name==p, algorithm=="macro_IR", Num_ch*interval_in_tau>10 )%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=interaction(Num_ch)))+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+scale_x_log10()+facet_wrap(~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }


```




```{r, fig.width=20, fig.height=20}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algorithm=="macro_IRV", Num_ch*interval_in_tau>9,is.na(value_row) | is.na(value_col) | value_row==value_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component%in% c("Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", "Fisher_Covariance"),param_name==p, Num_ch*interval_in_tau>0 )%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=component))+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, linetype =component))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=component))+scale_x_log10()+facet_grid(Num_ch~algorithm, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }


```

```{r}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Fisher_Covariance", algorithm=="macro_IRV", Num_ch*interval_in_tau>9,is.na(value_row) | is.na(value_col) | value_row==value_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Fisher_Covariance",param_name==p, algorithm=="macro_IRV", Num_ch*interval_in_tau>0 )%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=interaction(Num_ch)))+geom_line(aes(x = 1/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, linetype =factor(Num_ch)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/interval_in_tau, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(Num_ch)))+ geom_hline(yintercept = 1, color="darkgreen")+scale_x_log10()+facet_wrap(~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }


```



```{r, fig.height=10, fig.width=10}
param=d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algorithm=="macro_MRV", Num_ch*interval_in_tau>9,is.na(value_row) | is.na(value_col) | value_row==value_col)%>%select(param_name)%>%pull()%>%unique
for (p in param){
  print(

d_mean%>%filter(component=="Distortion_Corrected_Covariance",param_name==p, algorithm%in%c("macro_MRV", "macro_IRV", "macro_IRTV"), Num_ch*interval_in_tau>9 )%>%ggplot()+geom_point(aes(x = 1/Num_ch/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, color=interaction(algorithm)))+geom_line(aes(x = 1/Num_ch/interval_in_tau, y = mean_NA, linetype =factor(algorithm)))+geom_errorbar(aes(x=1/Num_ch/interval_in_tau, y= mean_NA,ymin = quantile_0.025,ymax = quantile_0.975 ,color=factor(algorithm)))+scale_x_log10()+facet_wrap(Num_ch~noise_in_conductance_tau, scales="free")+ggtitle(p)+scale_y_log10()
  )
  }


```



```{r, fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
make_figure(d_mean%>%filter(algorithm!="macro_MNR",algorithm!="macro_NR"),c("Distortion_Induced_Bias"))
```

```{r, fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
make_figure_per_Nch(d_mean%>%filter(algorithm=="macro_IR"),c("Distortion_Induced_Bias"))
```



mean_Sum_dlogL
```{r, fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
make_figure(d_mean%>%filter(algorithm!="macro_MNRV"),c("mean_Sum_dlogL"))
```


```{r, fig.width=20,fig.height=20}
make_figure(d_mean%>%filter(algorithm!="macro_"),c("mean_Sum_trust_coefficient"))
```
mean_Sum_dlogL



```{r, fig.width=10,fig.height=10}
make_figure(d_mean%>%filter(algorithm!="macro_MNRV"),c("Information_Distortion_Matrix"), type="log")




```




```{r, fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
make_figure(d_mean,c("Distortion_Corrected_Covariance"), "logarti")

```

```{r, fig.width=20,fig.height=10}
make_figure(d_mean%>%filter(algorithm!="macro_MNRV"),c("mean_Sum_r_std","Sum_mean_r_std","mean_Sum_logL"))

```


```{r}
make_figure(d_mean,c("mean_Sum_r2_std"),"ogg")

```

```{r}
make_figure(d_mean%>%filter(noise_in_conductance_tau==0.1, Num_ch==1, interval_in_tau==0.01),d_mean%>%select(component)%>%distinct()%>%pull())


```
